item.title: Random bullshit that made me laugh or smile
item.description:
One practical test is worth a thousand expert opinions
DIGNITY
Wish I could wake up
He fuckin schmoovin', look at him go!
This is what happened to me, I traded my gender for lo mein and I don't regret it one bit
Lesson learned? Undoubtedly not
Unnnh~
Two bowling videos for the price of one! (Free)
https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Snake#Locomotion is a really fun read! Such fascinating little noodles, so many ways of getting about sans jambes
Perfection
Seems fitting the 555 is the one grooving
SKY-RAT WITH NO HAAAIR
And of course cringepilled 16:9 enjoyers wouldn't even get this joke
Hearing good grammelot of a language you speak is always super trippy, what's even more trippy is losing the ability to do good grammelot of a language after learning it!
Low-key super insulting hahahaha, I haven't even done anything yet!
My nephew tried blowing on spicy crisps (chips), that memory always makes me smile
Being trans is really hard yo. Constantly feel like I look like this cat tbh. Almost everyone says "ugh, weird, ugly, different" and the ones who say "nooo you're beautiful" feel like the outliers. Is it understandable that I wish to sprout my fur, hide the wrinkles and be sleek and beautiful, or is that being conditioned to cater to the shallow whims of bigots? Who can say.
Whoops that was a lot. Haha fizz buzz fizz am I right?
This is genius because 90% of the time the kids are happy once they have something in front of them and they just start eating, you can make a joke out of cutting short the agony of their indecision, problem solved!
Oh to be a pig, drunk on corn mash and rolling down a hill. I guess it's not long to wait until new year's
Heheehoo big kitty
Nerd confession, I've never read or watched Dune. Should I bother? I get weird vibes from its fans sometimes
Ily xkcd tysm
Am I a masochist because I love these moments? It's awkward but I think it's fun and silly because I know they're fucking used to doing it all day every day so they aren't even mad at me
Can't tell you how it warms my heart to see NHS staff having a giggle
My brain waking up every morning
The very definition of a fetish
Take me down to the paradise city where the grass is green and the bay has kitties
Or maybe it's all the phytoestrogens /s
This one made me laugh a lot, real life Loki moment, god of trickery and pranks
The next few are a doozy, strap in
I just can't believe so many people's brains work this way
Such a perfectly crafted response. Simple and direct, made me cry laughing
Want us to mention you can't swap vegetable oil for motor? Don't substitute flour for borax. Don't use the freezer instead of the oven. How long does the list need to be SHARON?
Damn, real life has ray tracing? Cool
All the cool kids are doing it
Can't wait to see what stuff from today suffers a similar vibe shift in fifty years. Maybe a touristy postcard wishing for warm weather
Someone along the way has cropped the attribution, asshole. Her name is Taylor Tomlinson and she has a netflix special and lots of clips on YouTube, I like her a lot!
This gives me the good cyberpunk tingles
Another cropped attribution, ugh, I'm sorry. This one is by light roast comics, go check them out!
Hahaha fucking got you. Cutie. You silly gorgeous creature. You adorable buffoon. Get got, she made you HAPPY. Muahahahah
The best part about this one is always the little poops bouncing around everywhere
Sometimes we all need to hear this message. If that's you right now, go the fuck to sleep!
The gender wars have only just begun, soon there will be as many as two women in every country. It's a hostile takeover
Her fucking face hahahahaha
Do it. Do it and look at the squares again. I fucking dare you. You won't know what happens unless you try. I bet you won't though, coward.
I wanna hear verse 2
Hahaha savage, it's so much easier to be a hater than the hated, huh? I looked it up and the article is 100% real and sincere, it's on primagames, funny shit
That about wraps us up, I wish for you the chillness and untouchability of this gecko, love you honey, mwah
Cat tax, my darling Pearl. Please be kind to her, she lost her tail to complications with being too cute and cool, I think we can all relate
item.dc:creator: wired314

item.title: Here's how i made the most complex origami dragon in existence.

item.title: Dumps like a truck. What. What.
item.description:
Why downvote ?! This was an ad!!! In a JC Penney Catalog. Sheesh.
Monty Python is funny people.
Is this dump too harsh?
I think it's funny.
Someone has to have a dark sense of humor like me.
Okay maybe this dump IS a little cranky....
item.dc:creator: insertanyname

item.title: 21 Awesome and Useful Websites
item.description:
Listen to radio around the world https://radio.garden
See current wind, weather, ocean, and pollution conditions https://earth.nullschool.net
Get a temporarily email address to sign up to services https://10minutemail.com
One of the most complete museum of 80s and 90s video games on DOS, Windows, Amiga, C64, consoles and more. https://www.myabandonware.com/
Shows price history for products on Amazon https://keepa.com
Wondering where that plane, jet, or helicopter is going? https://www.flightradar24.com
Shows a list of popular products that are currently at their lowest price https://lp.deals
You can use it to "send emails to the future you". It helps put into perspective how much has changed over the course of a year https://www.futureme.org/
A digital archive of the World Wide Web. Get snapshots of how the web looked in the past https://archive.org/web/
Download almost any textbook as e-copy https://libgen.is
Create your own music by adding different instruments and beats https://www.incredibox.com/demo
Shows marine traffic around the world https://www.marinetraffic.com
A collection of unique online games and demos https://neal.fun
Combines all the softwares you want into a single package that you can easily install http://ninite.com
This website has most pc games from the 70's,80's,90's till the early 2000's. https://oldgamesdownload.com
Online image editor with similar features to Photoshop https://www.photopea.com
Remove background from any photo for free https://www.remove.bg
Gives free access to download almost any research paper https://sci-hub.mksa.top
Terms of Service, Didn’t Read summarizes terms of service and rates them for privacy. https://tosdr.org
Listen to relaxing music. Rain makes everything better https://rainymood.com
Pointer Pointer https://pointerpointer.com
item.dc:creator: Farrahfowler

item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: The struggle is real.
item.description: I'm so tired. All the time. It's not the kind of tired that sleep helps with. She's a reasonably good kid. She just takes all of my time. And energy. At the end of the day, when she's finally asleep, I've got nothing left in the tank for my wife, and she's just as worn me. Kills any notion of quality time. If I really want time for me, to pursue a hobby, it has to be while she's asleep, which usually means I have to stay up late to have any 'me time'. I regret being a father. She's a nice kid, but this just sucks. Sorry, just needed to rant. TL:DR, kid wears me out - nothing left.
item.dc:creator: Chelse

item.title: What a journey my self-taught painting has been!
item.description: In 2019, at the early start of my self-taught painting journey, I embarked on a canvas adventure that marked the beginning of my artistic painting exploration. One of the first paintings (after years of drawing cars), a testament to my nascent skills, captured the raw essence of my early influences and the tentative strokes that defined my artistic identity. The color palette was hesitant, the composition tentative, and the subject matter, though ambitious, revealed the novice hand behind the brush. Fast forward to 2023, and a new chapter unfolded on my canvas. The growth and evolution in my technique and perspective became palpable. The strokes, once tentative, now carried a confident fluidity, creating a harmonious dance of colors and forms. The composition had matured, revealing a deeper understanding of balance and proportion. The subject matter, while still echoing my personal journey, bore the mark of experience and introspection. As I compared the two paintings side by side, a narrative of my artistic odyssey unfolded. The 2019 piece stood as a humble origin story, a testament to the courage it took to embark on this creative venture. In contrast, the 2023 masterpiece emerged as a proclamation of resilience and dedication, a visual manifesto of the countless hours spent honing my craft. The color choices in the newer painting were more intentional, reflecting a nuanced understanding of hue and saturation. Shadows and highlights played together in a sophisticated dance, casting a depth that was lacking in its predecessor. The evolution of my artistic voice resonated through every brushstroke, a silent conversation between past and present. The thematic resonance between the two paintings spoke of continuity—a thread connecting the novice brushstrokes of 2019 to the refined strokes of 2023. The subject matter, while a personal narrative, had transformed from a mere exploration of ideas to a profound commentary on growth, self-discovery, and the passage of time. In essence, these two paintings became a visual timeline, capturing not only the progression of my technical skills but also the evolution of my artistic soul. Each stroke told a story, and the juxtaposition of these two canvases encapsulated the transformative journey from a novice dreamer to a seasoned artist embracing the canvas with confidence and purpose.
item.dc:creator: realisticcarpainting

item.title: Streaming Services kind of suck
item.description: I use a few services but at the rate of price increases and more and more services popping up with some dying before they're a year old, the constant price raises and even ads being introduced into what was an ad free experience: this is getting a little out of hand to say the least.
item.dc:creator: lemonofdoom2

item.title: It's my birthday. I'm old and sick
item.description:
First time getting the COVID ffs
First time trying to do a small dump. Don't give me shit if I did it wrong. Be constructive with your criticism. I'm old and sick. And, did I mention it's my fricken birthday?!?

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
every time
i wonder what the best sauce of the rain and sauce era was. honey mustard?
yes
cheese = life
no way someone got 10 out of 10
i guess
there's a resemblance
::honks::
fascinating
sigh, they are always in california (my home state)
mmm hmm
awww
i'm a loner Dottie, a rebel
there was a while when tetris was the only game i had, for my gameboy
love me some sleeping on one small blanket, just on the floor
that's it for me... happy holidays gang
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Cake Day Harry Potter Dump
item.description:
I’ve stolen many a Harry Potter meme slash funny over the last year, so I thought I would share. I’m re-reading the series again after getting a new shiny set of first editions for Christmas and I’m just so excited!! https://imgur.com/gallery/wIHq5
https://imgur.com/gallery/JRjktDv
